embeddableConfig.title: Requests Processed
embeddableConfig.description: The total number of viewer requests received by CloudFront, for all HTTP methods and for both HTTP and HTTPS requests.

embeddableConfig.title: Data Downloaded
embeddableConfig.description: The total number of bytes downloaded by viewers for GET, HEAD, and OPTIONS requests.

embeddableConfig.title: Data Uploaded
embeddableConfig.description: The total number of bytes that viewers uploaded to your origin with CloudFront, using POST and PUT requests.

embeddableConfig.title: Cache Hit Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all cacheable requests for which CloudFront served the content from its cache. HTTP POST and PUT requests, and errors, are not considered cacheable requests.

embeddableConfig.title: Origin Latency
embeddableConfig.description: The total time spent, in milliseconds, from when CloudFront receives a request to when it starts providing a response to the network (not the viewer), for requests that are served from the origin, not the CloudFront cache. This is also known as first byte latency, or time-to-first-byte.

embeddableConfig.title: 4xx Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 4xx.

embeddableConfig.title: 5xx Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 5xx.

embeddableConfig.title: 401 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 401.

embeddableConfig.title: 403 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 403.

embeddableConfig.title: 404 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 404.

embeddableConfig.title: 502 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 502.

embeddableConfig.title: 503 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 503.

embeddableConfig.title: 504 Error Rate
embeddableConfig.description: The percentage of all viewer requests for which the response's HTTP status code is 504.

embeddableConfig.title: Invocations
embeddableConfig.description: The number of times the function was started (invoked) in a given time period.

embeddableConfig.title: Compute Utilization
embeddableConfig.description: The amount of time (0-100) that the function took to run as a percentage of the maximum allowed time. For example, a value of 35 means that the function completed in 35% of the maximum allowed time.

embeddableConfig.title: Throttles
embeddableConfig.description: The number of times that the function was throttled in a given time period.

embeddableConfig.title: Execution Errors
embeddableConfig.description: The number of execution errors that occurred in a given time period. Execution errors occur when the function fails to complete successfully.

embeddableConfig.title: Validation Errors
embeddableConfig.description: The number of validation errors produced by the function in a given time period. Validation errors occur when the function runs successfully but returns invalid data (an invalid event object).
